summary: Iteration 16 testing complete. All backend API tests passed (23/23). Frontend UI tests verified all new features: Integrations section with popular grid and category cards, KI-SEO product section with benefits/pricing/FAQ, Services section with all product categories, Bundles section with 3 bundle cards, Trust section with operational security cards, Legal pages including KI-Hinweise. Integration detail pages (Salesforce, HubSpot, DATEV) load correctly with breadcrumb, use cases, FAQ, CTA, combined-with sections. PDF tariff sheet download works for all categories.
test_credentials: Not required for this iteration - public pages tested
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 focused on new UI features: Integrations overhaul (popular grid + category cards), SEO landing pages (/integrationen/:slug), KI-SEO product section, Services/Bundles restructure, PDF tariff sheet download, Trust section with operational security, Legal pages with KI-Hinweise. All features working correctly. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_16.py covers PDF endpoints, product APIs, legal pages, and integration detail pages.

integrations_section.details: Popular integrations grid and category cards render correctly

seo_detail_pages.details: /integrationen/salesforce, /integrationen/hubspot, /integrationen/datev all load with breadcrumb, use cases, FAQ, CTA, combined-with sections

ki_seo_section.details: Benefits grid, pricing tiers (3), FAQ section all render

services_section.details: All product categories (Websites, Apps, SEO, AI Agents, Add-ons) render with pricing

bundles_section.details: 3 bundle cards (Digital Starter, Growth Digital, Enterprise Digital) render

pdf_tariff_sheet.details: /api/product/tariff-sheet returns valid PDF for all categories (all, seo, agents, websites, bundles)

navigation.details: KI-SEO and Services links present in navigation

trust_section.details: Operational security cards (DSGVO/AVG, EU AI Act, EU-Hosting, Verschluesselung, Privacy by Design, ISO 27001/27701) render
